design_philosophy.name: Tactical Modern
core_principles: Urgency through Contrast: High-visibility neons against deep matte black.
Thumb-Zone First: Critical actions (SOS, Upload) must be reachable with one hand.
Data Density with Breath: Dashboard grids must be dense but separated by clean gutters.
Feedback is King: Every tap must have immediate visual/haptic feedback (pulse, ripple, glow).

headings.usage: Page titles, SOS alerts, Stat numbers

citizen_mobile.special_rules: Bottom-heavy layout. Primary actions in lower 50% of screen.

buttons.primary: bg-primary hover:bg-red-600 text-white font-bold py-4 px-8 rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(239,68,68,0.4)] transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.sos: rounded-full w-32 h-32 bg-red-600 text-white font-black text-3xl shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(220,38,38,0.6)] animate-pulse border-4 border-red-400
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary/10 text-secondary border border-secondary/20 hover:bg-secondary/20 py-3 px-6 rounded-lg font-medium

cards.base: bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-5 shadow-lg relative overflow-hidden
cards.incident: bg-surface border-l-4 border-l-primary hover:bg-surface_highlight transition-colors cursor-pointer

inputs.base: bg-black/50 border border-input text-white rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent outline-none placeholder:text-muted-foreground

visual_enhancers.scanlines: background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 2px, 3px 100%;

animation.gpay_success: See CSS implementation for tick animation
animation.page_transition: initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, exit: { opacity: 0, y: -20 }

instructions_to_main_agent: Add 'Barlow Condensed' and 'JetBrains Mono' to index.html or import in CSS.
Implement the 'GPay Success' animation in a separate CSS module or component.
For the Police Dashboard, use the 'dashboard_bg' image with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80) to ensure text readability.
The SOS button must be the most prominent element on the Citizen Home screen.
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (emergency sent, location updated).
Ensure the 'scanlines' effect is subtle and does not interfere with readability.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible, except for the SOS button which demands centrality.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index).
Use glass-morphism effects for floating navigations.
NEVER use generic AI emoji icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
